title: Citrusy Dense Kenyan Melon Salad
description: This vegan-friendly and refreshing citrusy salad is perfect for a post-workout meal, featuring melons marinated with various citrus fruits and spices.
instructions: Prepare the blood oranges by cutting off the top and bottom, then slice them open. Use a spoon to scoop out the flesh into a bowl.
Add the agave nectar, lemon juice, lime juice, salt, and cayenne pepper to the melon mixture in a large mixing bowl.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly combined. Then add the diced blood oranges and mix again.
Gently fold in the Greek yogurt and chopped fresh mint leaves into the melon mixture using a wooden spoon or spatula.
Transfer the mixture into individual serving bowls, garnish with extra mint if desired.
